summary: Planned conservative PR-inventory classifications for the 10 listed open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because this is plan mode, merge/fix actions are blocked, low-signal closeout is disabled, and several items require either security routing or maintainer judgment rather than automated cleanup.

actions.reason: Security-boundary-labeled supervisor exec behavior is out of scope for automated PR inventory cleanup.
Standalone feature/contract PR needing proof rather than duplicate, low-signal, or closure handling.
There is related same-title docs-template lint work, but canonical choice is unclear from the compacted artifact, so no superseded/duplicate closure is planned.
Provider request header/auth changes are security-sensitive and should go through central OpenClaw security handling.
Related to the compaction/session-state family, but not safely closeable or mergeable from this inventory plan.
Reasoning/thinking exposure and raw stream handling are security/privacy-sensitive enough to route centrally rather than triage through backlog cleanup.
Maintainer-owned XL skill import/taxonomy scope needs maintainer judgment, not automated close or merge planning.
Maintainer-owned taxonomy PR is related to #91452 but requires maintainer product/scope judgment.
Standalone mobile UI fix with proof supplied; no conservative close action applies.
Useful contributor PR, not low-signal or duplicate; it should remain open for author/maintainer follow-up rather than automated closure.
